attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ORGANIZATION_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CREATION_DATE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CREATED_BY, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SUMMARY_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),CHR(34),' '),
CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.BUYER_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVOICING_RULE_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SEGMENT1, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PURCHASING_ITEM_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SHIPPABLE_ITEM_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CUSTOMER_ORDER_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INTERNAL_ORDER_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SERVICE_ITEM_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVENTORY_ITEM_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ENG_ITEM_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVENTORY_ASSET_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PURCHASING_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CUSTOMER_ORDER_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INTERNAL_ORDER_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SO_TRANSACTIONS_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.MTL_TRANSACTIONS_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.STOCK_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.BOM_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.BUILD_IN_WIP_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.DEFAULT_SHIPPING_ORG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.LIST_PRICE_PER_UNIT, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ASSET_CATEGORY_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.EXPENSE_ACCOUNT, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ENCUMBRANCE_ACCOUNT, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.UNIT_WEIGHT, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.WEIGHT_UOM_CODE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.LEAD_TIME_LOT_SIZE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.BOM_ITEM_TYPE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PICK_COMPONENTS_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.REPLENISH_TO_ORDER_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.BASE_ITEM_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATP_COMPONENTS_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATP_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.FIXED_LEAD_TIME, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.WIP_SUPPLY_TYPE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.WIP_SUPPLY_SUBINVENTORY, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PRIMARY_UOM_CODE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SALES_ACCOUNT, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.DEFAULT_INCLUDE_IN_ROLLUP_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PLANNING_MAKE_BUY_CODE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CARRYING_COST, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PREPROCESSING_LEAD_TIME, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.FULL_LEAD_TIME, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATP_RULE_ID, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.VENDOR_WARRANTY_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SERVICEABLE_COMPONENT_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SERVICEABLE_PRODUCT_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVOICEABLE_ITEM_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVOICE_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.MUST_USE_APPROVED_VENDOR_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.OUTSIDE_OPERATION_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.COSTING_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.AUTO_CREATED_CONFIG_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CYCLE_COUNT_ENABLED_FLAG, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ITEM_TYPE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.MRP_PLANNING_CODE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CONTRACT_ITEM_TYPE_CODE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.DEFAULT_SO_SOURCE_TYPE, CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CREATE_SUPPLY_FLAG,  CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE15 ,CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15
FROM
 $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B 
WHERE
 SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B)

SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ASSET_CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATP_COMPONENTS_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATP_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CREATE_SUPPLY_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CUSTOMER_ORDER_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CUSTOMER_ORDER_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.CYCLE_COUNT_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.DEFAULT_SO_SOURCE_TYPE, TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.DESCRIPTION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ENG_ITEM_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INTERNAL_ORDER_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVOICEABLE_ITEM_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVOICE_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVOICING_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ITEM_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.MRP_PLANNING_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.MTL_TRANSACTIONS_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.MUST_USE_APPROVED_VENDOR_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.OUTSIDE_OPERATION_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PICK_COMPONENTS_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PLANNING_MAKE_BUY_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PRIMARY_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PURCHASING_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PURCHASING_ITEM_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.REPLENISH_TO_ORDER_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SALES_ACCOUNT, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SEGMENT1, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SERVICEABLE_COMPONENT_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SERVICEABLE_PRODUCT_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SERVICE_ITEM_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SHIPPABLE_ITEM_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SO_TRANSACTIONS_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.STOCK_ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SUMMARY_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.VENDOR_WARRANTY_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.WIP_SUPPLY_SUBINVENTORY, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.WIP_SUPPLY_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.LEAD_TIME_LOT_SIZE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.EXPENSE_ACCOUNT, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ENCUMBRANCE_ACCOUNT, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.DEFAULT_INCLUDE_IN_ROLLUP_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PREPROCESSING_LEAD_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.FULL_LEAD_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.DEFAULT_SHIPPING_ORG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATP_RULE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.NON_COMMERCE_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.UNIT_WEIGHT, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.WEIGHT_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ATTRIBUTE15 , STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B,
(
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B
 minus
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME
